footer.rights: © 2025 TechPro · Annecy & surrounding area · All rights reserved

hero.tag: Available 7 days a week · Annecy & surrounding area
hero.sub: Advice, setup, troubleshooting and repair for all your digital devices. Fast, reliable, and transparently priced.

services.label: What we do
services.title: All your IT needs, covered
services.intro: From simple advice to urgent repairs, we handle all your digital devices with expertise and transparency.

items.title: Repair
items.description: Cracked screens, failing batteries, keyboards, connectors — we replace the components and get your devices working again.

items.title: Advice & Setup
items.description: Not sure which equipment to choose? We guide you toward the best options for your budget and needs, then set everything up.

items.title: Security & Viruses
items.description: Virus and malware removal, antivirus installation, securing your accounts and personal data. Browse with peace of mind.

items.title: Optimization
items.description: Is your machine slow? We clean it up, optimize it, and swap the drive for an SSD if needed. Result: like new.

items.title: Network & Router
items.description: Wi-Fi setup, internet box, range extenders, NAS, local file sharing. A stable, fast network for the whole house.

items.title: On-site support
items.description: We come to you for interventions that require it. We bring the equipment — you don't have to carry anything.

why.label: Why choose us
why.title: Simple, fast, and no bad surprises

items.title: Free quote, no obligation
items.description: We explain the problem and the cost before starting. No hidden fees, ever.

items.title: Fast turnaround
items.description: Most common repairs are done the same day, sometimes within the hour.

items.title: We explain everything
items.description: We simplify, we teach, we show. No jargon, no condescension.

items.title: Warranty on every repair
items.description: Every job is covered for 3 months. If the problem comes back, so do we.

visual.text: We're just getting started in Annecy and the surrounding area. Be one of our first clients and enjoy some extra-special attention!

steps.title: Book an appointment
steps.description: Choose a time slot online in 2 minutes.

steps.title: Diagnosis
steps.description: We analyze the problem and give you a quote.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.description: Device returned in perfect condition, guaranteed for 3 months.

digital.label: Digital skills
digital.title: Beyond repair services
digital.intro: Trained as a developer and designer, I also put my web and design skills at your service to grow your online presence.

banner.title: Have a website or brand identity project?
banner.text: Beyond IT support, I can help with digital projects: website creation, graphic redesign, SEO, or accessibility audits. One trusted person for all your digital needs.

items.title: Website creation
items.description: Showcase sites, portfolios, sites for craftspeople or shop owners. From polished design to clean code, delivered turnkey and easy to update.

items.title: Graphic design & branding
items.description: Logo, brand guidelines, communication materials (flyers, business cards, social media). A consistent visual identity that reflects your image.

items.title: Search engine optimization (SEO)
items.description: Audit, page optimization, keyword strategy, tags, load speed. Being visible on Google is something you learn and build.

items.title: Accessibility audit
items.description: Is your site usable by everyone? I analyze your site against WCAG criteria and provide a clear report with priority fixes.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Clear pricing from the start
pricing.intro: All our rates include the diagnosis. You know exactly what you're paying before any work begins.

digitalBanner.title: A web, graphic, or SEO project?
digitalBanner.text: Website development, branding, SEO, accessibility — every project is unique, and so is its price. Let's talk about a personalized, no-obligation quote.

info.label: Let's talk
info.title: We're here to help
info.text: A question before booking? An urgent problem? Contact us however suits you best. We usually reply within 2 hours.

form.title: Send a message
form.subject: Subject
form.error: The message could not be sent. Please try again in a moment.
form.successText: Thank you for your message. We'll get back to you within a few hours.

items.question: How much does a diagnosis cost?
items.answer: The diagnosis is always free and with no obligation. We'll explain the problem and the repair cost before starting anything.

items.question: Do you come to my home?
items.answer: Yes, we travel to Annecy and within a 30 km radius. Travel fees are €20 and are deducted if you drop the device off at the workshop.

items.question: How long does a repair take?
items.answer: Most common repairs (cleaning, viruses, optimization) are done in 1 to 3 hours. Hardware repairs requiring parts can take 24 to 48h.

items.question: Which brands do you support?
items.answer: We work on all brands: Apple, Samsung, HP, Dell, Lenovo, Asus, Acer, Microsoft Surface, and many more. Both Windows and macOS.

items.question: Is my data safe?
items.answer: Absolutely. We never share your data with third parties. Before any intervention, we recommend a backup, which we can do for you if needed.

rdv.label: Online booking
rdv.title: Choose your time slot
rdv.intro: Book in just a few clicks. You'll receive an email confirmation with all the details of your appointment.
